rows.label: qev025704_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh, my! An Earthling, aren't you?
I am very interested in you people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025704_MSG0002
rows.name:
If you want to talk,
I'll keep you company for as long as you like, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025704_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Biiponne for her three sizes.

rows.label: qev025704_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what interests her about Earthlings.

rows.label: qev025704_MSG0003
rows.name:
Oh, my! Did you come at my daughter's request?
What has Panyal started this time?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025704_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Making underwear with Earthlings?
Well, she's started something quite interesting, hasn't she![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025704_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'll cooperate however I can.
You just need me to measure my three sizes, right?
Please wait just a moment![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025704_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hehe, I wonder if Ma-non will be able to dress up fashionably
like Earthlings do from now on?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025704_MSG0008
rows.name:
I am looking forward to it very much.
Please tell my daughter to do her best, won't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025704_MSG0009
rows.name: Earthlings, unlike Ma-non, dress themselves up with all sorts of things, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025704_MSG0010
rows.name:
It's very gorgeous, and it's fun just looking at it.
Someday, I'd like to dress up fashionably like an Earthling too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025704_MSG0011
rows.name:
I am really looking forward to the completion of underwear
that fits me perfectly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025704_MSG0012
rows.name: Please tell Panyal to do her best, won't you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025704_MSG0013
rows.name: Panyal sent me an immediate message, you know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025704_MSG0014
rows.name: She said underwear is an incredibly tight restraint device.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025704_MSG0015
rows.name:
To constantly wear something like that on your body...
Earthlings truly possess a gruesome history and culture, don't you...[ST:wait ]
